channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Block Party offers tool for optimizing social media privacy
item.description: If optimizing your social media privacy settings feels important but overwhelming, a company called Block Party may be able to help. Founder and CEO Tracy Chou has long been known for advocating for diversity in the tech industry.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Stupendous Python stunts without a net
item.description: In this week’s Python Report: Sly tricks for setting up Python on a machine with no network, snappier Python code with asyncand await, swifter Python programs with Zig, and slicker web apps with HTMX and Django.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Still can't get a Fujifilm X100VI? This premium Leica compact costs less, and it's in stock
item.description: The Leica D-Lux 8 is premium compact camera with plenty of appeal, and unlike Fujifilm and Canon rivals, it's currently in stock.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: IDC: 80% of companies plan to buy AI PCs this year
item.description: AI PCs could solve key issues organizations face when using cloud and data center AI instances, including cost, security, and privacy concerns, according to a new study by IDC Research. Nearly all organizations are already using or planning to use cloud-based AI platforms.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Tesla says it is 'exposed' to retaliatory tariffs
item.description: Tesla warned U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer that the electric vehicle (EV) company and other American exporters are “inherently exposed” to retaliatory tariffs levied in response to ones from the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Volt Typhoon threat group had access to American utility networks for the best part of a year
item.description: 2023 saw the Chinese threat group Volt Typhoon get access to public power and water utilities in Massachusetts for 10 months.
item.dc:creator: luke.hughes@futurenet.com (Luke Hughes), TechRadar

item.title: Apple releases emergency security update for serious vulnerability
item.description: A newly discovered security flaw with your iPhone or iPad could leave your personal information vulnerable to hackers. Kurt the CyberGuy explains.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CEOs think they might lose their jobs if they can't deliver on AI
item.description: Company leaders understand the importance of AI strategies, but confusing regulations are holding them back.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: CAIOs are stepping out from the CIO’s shadow
item.description: In 2016, Andrew Ng, one of the best-known researchers in the field of AI, wrote about the benefits of establishing a chief AI officer role in companies, as well as the characteristics and responsibilities such a role should have.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Intel under Tan: What enterprise IT buyers need to know
item.description: Intel’s appointment of semiconductor veteran Lip-Bu Tan as CEO marks a critical moment for the company and its enterprise customers. With rising competition from AMD, Arm-based chips, and RISC-V alternatives, Intel faces mounting pressure to defend its x86 dominance.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Postponed NASA, Space X Falcon 9 mission rescheduled for Friday
item.description: NASA and SpaceX rescheduled the launch of their Falcon 9 rocket rescue mission to the International Space Station for Friday. They were unable to launch on Wednesday due to issues with equipment on the ground, and opted to scrub a Thursday launch attempt due to weather.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Intel taps industry veteran as newest CEO in latest comeback attempt
item.description: Struggling chipmaker Intel has hired former board member and semiconductor industry veteran Lip-Bu Tan as the latest in a succession of CEOs to attempt to turn around a once-dominant company that helped define Silicon Valley.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra could resurrect an intriguing camera feature
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra has been tipped to feature main camera with physically variable aperture.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: StudentAid.gov website went down, following mass layoffs at Department of Education
item.description: An hourslong outage Wednesday on StudentAid.gov, the federal website for student loans and financial aid, underscored the risks in rapidly gutting the Department of Education, as President Donald Trump aims to dismantle the agency.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: DOGE may be using an algorithm to fire federal workers
item.description: In the past month and a half, the Trump Administration has drastically reduced the federal government workforce. The cuts alone have generated concern and anger among workers and those who rely on US government services.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump calls EU ‘nasty’ while sitting alongside NATO secretary
item.description: President Trump on Thursday called the European Union "nasty" while sitting alongside NATO Secretary-General Mark Rutte. Trump complained about the steep tariff on U.S.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: Greece says ambitious Mediterranean power cable project is on track despite setbacks
item.description: ATHENS, Greece (AP) — The future of an ambitious electricity cable linking the power grids of Greece, Cyprus and Israel by the end of the decade is on track despite a series of setbacks, Greece’s Foreign Minister Giorgos Gerapetritis said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: OpenAI calls for US to centralize AI regulation
item.description: OpenAI executives think the federal government should regulate artificial intelligence in the US, taking precedence over often more restrictive state regulations.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Intel shares jump after naming chip industry veteran Tan CEO
item.description: Shares of Intel Corp. jumped the most in five years after the company named Lip-Bu Tan as its next chief executive officer, entrusting a former board member and semiconductor veteran with one of the toughest jobs in the chip industry.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Meta Tests Crowd-Sourced Fact-Checking Program
item.description: Meta Platforms Inc., parent company of Facebook and Instagram, tests crowd-sourced fact-checking program, Community Notes, with initial focus on ratings system used by Elon Musk's X.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The Scopes monkey trial took place 100 years ago, but the fight isn't over
item.description: Tennessee became the first state in the country a hundred years ago to ban the teaching of evolution in public school classrooms.
item.dc:creator: Kimberlee Kruesi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: DeepSeek
item.description: DeepSeek, founded in 2023 by Liang Wenfeng, a Chinese entrepreneur, engineer and former hedge fund manager, is generating a lot of buzz — and for good reason. Here are five things that make it stand out (as well as a listing of the latest news and analysis about DeepSeek).
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How the Futures Command is helping Army to envision NGC2
item.description: Joe Welch, the deputy to the commanding general of the Army Futures Command, said the characteristics of need helps define the problem set for industry. The post How the Futures Command is helping Army to envision NGC2 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: New delivery robot can haul 2,200 pounds of your stuff
item.description: WeRide's unmanned electric delivery van, the Robovan W5, has 194 cubic feet of cargo space and can carry payloads up to about 2,205 pounds
item.dc:creator: Fox News
